name: MEDIFAST INC
summary: Medifast, Inc. is a 40+ year old health and wellness company operating a coach-guided lifestyle system focused on metabolic health and weight loss. The company sells scientifically developed nutrition products under the OPTA VIA brand through a network of approximately 16,100 independent coaches. Its flagship 5 & 1 Plan and product lines including OPTA VIA ASCEND and OPTA VIA ACTIVE address weight loss, fat burn, and metabolic dysfunction.
